name: Lo Mein
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Raw lean pork, cut into matchsticks
2 oz Raw lean beef, cut into matchstick-sized pieces
2 oz Raw chicken, cut into small pieces of any shape
2 oz Raw shelled shrimp (cooked will do)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the noodles and cook for 3 minutes. Drain and toss with sesame oil and regular oil; set aside.
2. In four separate dishes, mix each meat with half a teaspoon of sherry and half a teaspoon of cornstarch.
3. Heat the oil in a skillet or wok over high heat. Add the meats one at a time, stirring for a few seconds between each addition: pork, beef, chicken, and shrimp. As soon as you've added and tossed the shrimp, add the mushrooms and cabbage. Cook until the cabbage is wilted.
4. Add scallions, soy sauce, salt, and MSG (or chicken bouillon). Stir to combine.
5. Add the noodles and bean sprouts, and stir-fry for 3 minutes. Serve hot on a warm platter.
